Project NOMAD：离线 AI 服务器，让任何人都能在电脑上运行 AI

Project NOMAD: Offline AI Server - Run AI on Your Own Computer

2026-03-23

Project NOMAD（Node for Offline Media, Archives, and Data）是一个免费开源的离线服务器，让你可以在自己的电脑上运行 LLM、AI 助手、离线地图和知识库。无需互联网，永不断线。

核心功能

  • 离线知识库：Wikipedia、医学参考手册、修复指南，全部存储在本地
  • 本地 AI：通过 Ollama 运行强大的大语言模型，完全离线
  • 离线地图：OpenStreetMap 数据，导航无需网络
  • 教育平台：Khan Academy 等课程离线使用

适用场景

  • 应急准备：基础设施故障时，NOMAD 依然可用——医学参考、生存指南、百科知识，无需网络
  • 离网生活：在 cabin、RV 或帆船上，带着完整的图书馆、AI 助手和离线地图
  • 技术爱好者：运行本地 LLM、自托管知识库、完全掌控数据
  • 教育：Khan Academy、Wikipedia for Schools —— 即使没有网络也能学习

硬件要求

处理器AMD Ryzen 7 with Radeon graphics 或 Intel i7+
内存32 GB RAM
显卡集成 AMD Radeon 780M+ 或独立 NVIDIA GPU
存储1 TB SSD

推荐 Ubuntu 22.04+ 或 Debian 12+。Windows 可通过 Docker Desktop 运行。

60 秒安装

$ curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad/main/install/install_nomad.sh -o install_nomad.sh
$ sudo bash install_nomad.sh

阅读完整文章：https://www.projectnomad.us/

Project NOMAD (Node for Offline Media, Archives, and Data) is a free, open-source offline server that lets you run LLMs, AI assistants, offline maps, and knowledge bases on your own computer. No internet required.

Core Features

  • Offline Knowledge: Wikipedia, medical references, repair guides — all stored locally
  • Local AI: Run powerful LLMs completely offline via Ollama
  • Offline Maps: OpenStreetMap data for navigation without network
  • Education Platform: Khan Academy courses offline

Use Cases

  • Emergency Preparedness: When infrastructure fails, NOMAD keeps working — medical references, survival guides, encyclopedic knowledge
  • Off-Grid Living: Cabin, RV, or sailboat — bring a complete library, AI assistant, and offline maps
  • Tech Enthusiasts: Run local LLMs, self-host your knowledge base, own your data
  • Education: Khan Academy, Wikipedia for Schools — complete learning resources without connectivity

Hardware Requirements

ProcessorAMD Ryzen 7 with Radeon graphics or Intel i7+
Memory32 GB RAM
GraphicsIntegrated AMD Radeon 780M+ or dedicated NVIDIA GPU
Storage1 TB SSD

Ubuntu 22.04+ or Debian 12+ recommended. Windows support via Docker Desktop.

60-Second Install

$ curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad/main/install/install_nomad.sh -o install_nomad.sh
$ sudo bash install_nomad.sh

Read the full article at https://www.projectnomad.us/
